title: Integrated sentence task
objective: Usar el orden de palabras en una conversación nueva.

activities.prompt: I study English at night because I work during the day.

activities.feedback_correct: Orden natural sujeto + verbo + objeto + lugar.

activities.feedback_incorrect: Reordena a We study English every day.

activities.prompt: Where do you work? I work at home. What do you study? I study English.
activities.feedback_correct: La conversación fluye con orden claro.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica preguntas y respuestas por separado.

activities.prompt: Luis works at a hotel. He studies English at night. He drinks coffee in the morning.
activities.question: When does Luis study English?
activities.feedback_correct: La respuesta está en la segunda frase.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences with actions, objects, places and times.
Answer questions about your routine and ask three questions back.
activities.feedback_correct: La IA evalúa comunicación y orden.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Reformula una frase a la vez.

activities.prompt: Give a one-minute description of what you do, where and when.
activities.feedback_correct: Transferiste el orden a una producción libre.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa conectores simples: and, then, every day.

activities.prompt: Describe your routine, ask two questions and answer one follow-up question.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Repasa la parte del orden que causó dificultad.
